channel.title: Home on Cao, Rui (Ray) @ RUI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Cao, Rui (Ray) @ RUI Lab

item.title: About
item.description: Dr. Rui Cao is an Assistant Professor at the Thrust of Urban Governance and Design, Society Hub, The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou) where he leads the RUI (Responsible Urban Intelligence) Lab . He specializes in Geographic Information Science (GIScience), with a particular interest in GeoAI and Urban Informatics. His research focuses on multi-source spatiotemporal data fusion and its applications in urban sensing and analytics, aiming to advance sustainable and human-centered smart cities for societal benefit.

item.title: Recent Projects
item.description: • Urban Informal Settlements Mapping and Dynamics Analysis in China

item.title: Recent Publications
item.description:
• Long, H., Liu, J., Cao, R. (2026). Building and road recognition in dense urban informal settlements: A dataset and benchmark”. IGARSS 2026. [ Paper | Preprint | GitHub ]
  • Wu, M., Cao, R. (2026). Vision-based localization in dense urban environments: A case study of an urban village in China. SpatialDI 2026. [ Paper | Preprint ]
  • Cao, R., Pan, J., Liao, C., Zhang, W., & Zhuang, Y. (2026). GeoMarX: Empowering Geospatial Marking and Annotation for Complex Targets in Urban Environments. Urban Informatics, 5(1), 11. [ Paper | GitHub ]
  • Yu, J., Tu, W., Chen, X., Li, M., Chen, D., Cao, R., & Li, Q. (2026). Exploring geo-transferability of deep neural network by developing comprehensive metrics. Geo-spatial Information Science, 29(1), 599-617. [ Paper ]
  • Zhou, Y., Long, H., Zhang, Y., & Cao, R. (2025). Semi-supervised urban village recognition from remote sensing images by integrating low-and high-frequency signals. IGARSS 2025. [ Paper ]
  • Zhang, W., Tong, Y., Liu, Y., & Cao, R. (2025). Mapping the vanishing and transformation of urban villages in China. Sustainable Cities and Society, 135, 106970. [ Paper | Preprint ]
  • Cao, R., Tu, W., Chen, D., & Zhang, W. (2025). Mapping urban villages in China: Progress and challenges. Computers, Environment and Urban Systems, 119, 102282. [ Paper | Preprint | GitHub ]
  • Yue, Y., Yan, G., Lan, T., Cao, R., Gao, Q., Gao, W., … & Claramunt, C. (2025). Shaping future sustainable cities with AI-powered urban informatics: Toward human-AI symbiosis. Computational Urban Science, 5(1), 31. [ Paper ]

Full list can be found at Google Scholar .

item.title: Research Group
item.description:
The RUI (Responsible Urban Intelligence) Lab focuses on the research of GeoAI and Urban Informatics based on multisource and multimodal spatiotemporal big data. Our ultimate goal is using geospatial and AI technologies responsibly to help build sustainable and human-centred smart cities for the benefit of society.

Join Us

[***📢] There are openings for Postdoc, PhD, MPhil, RA and Visiting Scholar positions. We welcome motivated students and researchers to join our team. Scholars and students having a strong foundation in GIScience (including GIS, Remote Sensing, Photogrammetry, etc.), Computer Science, Urban Science or related disciplines are especially encouraged to apply.
